description.p: GradientContour follows the contours of the target vector path. Floor controls the colour ramp floor and Multiplier controls the ramp scale.
This gradient operates exclusively in BOUNDING_BOX space. If Gradient.Units is set to USERSPACE it will be reset to BOUNDING_BOX during initialisation.

field.name: Floor
field.comment: Colour ramp floor for contour gradients.

description.p: The Floor value is used as the floor for contour gradient colour values. It has a valid range of 0 <= Floor < Multiplier; the constraint against Multiplier is enforced at initialisation.

field.name: Multiplier
field.comment: Colour ramp multiplier for contour gradients.

description.p: The Multiplier value acts as a multiplier for contour gradient colour values. It has a valid range of .01 < Multiplier < 10.
